since_last: 48% of 87 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +4.13%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 48% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.10% · BTC -2.77% · Gold -2.78% · Nasdaq100 -0.43%. 48% of 87 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +4.13%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +4.13%; weakest is AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure at -1.51%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: MU is the standout at +15.56%
cards.body: Leaders: MU +15.56%, QCOM +9.13%, LRCX +7.45%, AMAT +7.32%, TER +6.40%. Laggards: MDB -5.60%, BBAI -5.57%, AVAV -3.74%, SMR -3.68%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -1.29% at $154.1
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -1.29% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
